PLAINTIFF THEODORE JONES' MOTION TO REMOVE CASE FROM JUDICIAL ARBITRATION, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE TO EXTEND THE ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. CASE IS ORDERED REMOVED FROM JUDICIAL ARBITRATION. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. COURT ORDERED A JURY TRIAL DATE SCHEDULED ON 2/17/2009 AT 9:30 AM, IN DEPARTMENT 206. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Remove Case From Judicial Arbitration Or, Alternatively, To Extend The Arbitrator'S Jurisdiction
Off Calendar Aug-14-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Theodore Jones' Motion to remove case from Judicial Arbitration, or in the alternative to extend the Arbitrator's Jurisdiction is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Judicial Arbitration. Moving Party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered a Jury Trial Date scheduled on 2/17/2009 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez, CSR# 7782. (212)
